titleStmt.title: SII 31.104: original edition by C. A. Padmanabha Sastri and T. S. Ravishankar
No. 104. (A.R. No. B 238 of 1938.) KAMALĀPURAM, KAMALAPURAM TALUK, CUDDAPAH DISTRICT.

summary.p: On the north wall of the Varadarājasvāmi temple.
This record is dated in Śaka 1471(2), Sādhāraṇa, Chaitra, śu. 5, corresponding to March 23, Sunday 1550 A.D.

Refers to an agreement between China Timōja, grandson of Agasāla komḍōju, the son of Tiṁmaluru Bhumōju Pāpayya. Yerabayyana. Chinamallōpi and other goldsmiths of Kamalāpuram and Chiḍipirāla on the rights and incomes (Kōṇāchis and ōjarikas) of thirteen specified villages (Kamalapuram, Chadipirāla, Pāsugalapāḍu, Yerra guḍipāḍu, Pamdillapalli, Tippaluru, Jaṁmapuram, Agastilimgampalli, Gollapalli, Amireḍipalli, Taramaḷarājupalli, Yāluru). This agreement is witnessed by several witnesses.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti . śrījayābhyudaya śālivāhana śakava¨rṣaṁbulu 1471 Agha(gu)nēṭi sādhāraṇa saṁvatsara
caItra (caitra)suddha 5lu śrīmadrājādhirāja paramēśvara śrīvīrapratāpa śrīsadāsi(śi)vadēva mahārājulu
gāru vidyānagaramaṁdu vajrasiṁhāsanārūḍhulai pṛdvīsāmrājyaṁ sēyucuṁḍaṁgānu śrīmatu Agasāla koṁḍōju
yaṟṟabayyanakoḍku cina tiṁmōja tuṁmalūri bhūtūju pāpayakoḍku Ayagārūṁnu naluguru¨rnu pedama
llōju cinamallōju cina gāribasuvōju koḍku yeṟṟabayyana vīrusalugurunu pāpōjukoḍku pāpābatugunu
ṁgōju koḍku yarrasiddōju vārunu tamalōtāmu tōli vrāyiṁcina
kramameṭlaṁnnanu grāmālu kāmalāpuraṁ cadipirāla pāsugalapāḍu yarraguḍipāḍu paṁdiḷapalli tippalūru ja
ṁmapuraṁ Agastiliṁgamupalle gollapalli Alūreḍlipalle kāmalaparānucellē taramaḷarājupalle yavāru yīgrāmālu 12ya
koṁḍōjugāri pāla tuṁmalūrunu mallōjugāri pāri komalāpuraṁlōnu
sagamunu batunigāri pāli kāmalāpuraṁlōnu sagamunu tipalūruma yīmūḍu
kāmalāpuraṁ yenimidi grāmāla kuṁnnu mūḍu
galaharaṁ yilunu voppi vrāyiṁcina
reḍini mareḍini Ēṁjēṭi liṁgāreḍini nāgāba tuṁdubu
voḍla liṁgabatuḍunu vīru kāmalāpuraṁ grāmakara mayyakomāraḍu viraṁyya vrā
kaṁnula nāgābattudu kāmalāpuraṁ cedipurēlanu yeraguḍipāṭanu
nu tippalūranu śāsanālu .
Digital edition of SII 31.104 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
